templates.name: Urban Alleyways
templates.description: Narrow streets, rooftops, and the back corridors of a crowded city.
templates.scenario: [Example] A cutpurse flees the festival crowd, the City Watch in pursuit.

zones.name: Rooftops
zones.description: Sloped tiles and narrow gaps between buildings. A fall from here would hurt.

zones.name: Main Street
zones.description: Wide and crowded. A procession of festival-goers clogs the thoroughfare.

pills.label: Crowded
pills.detail: A festival procession clogs the street.

zones.name: Canal Bridge
zones.description: A narrow stone bridge over brown water. Beggars line the sides.

zones.name: Back Alley
zones.description: Refuse, washing lines, and a stray dog. Narrow enough to choke a rider.

zones.name: Inn Kitchen
zones.description: Hot ovens, low-hanging pots, shouting cooks. A back door leads out.

pills.label: Obstacle
pills.detail: Low pots and hot surfaces. Acrobatics to cross without burns.

zones.name: Warehouse Row
zones.description: Tall shuttered buildings. Dockhands moving cargo. A good place to disappear.

templates.name: Wilderness Trails
templates.description: Forest paths, rising ground, hiding places in the undergrowth.
templates.scenario: [Example] A deserter flees into the deep forest, the King's Trackers on the warrant.

zones.name: Ridge
zones.description: Higher ground. A clear view in all directions — and easy to be seen.

zones.name: Pine Slope
zones.description: Steep, slick with needles. Hard going, but good cover among the trunks.

zones.name: Deer Trail
zones.description: A narrow game path, overgrown with brambles but straight and fast.

zones.name: Rocky Cut
zones.description: Loose scree between boulders. Footing is bad, but it's a shortcut.

pills.label: Obstacle
pills.detail: Loose scree. Dex save DC 12 or fall prone while dashing.

zones.name: Stream
zones.description: Cold water to the shins. Slippery stones. Breaks scent, slows movement.

pills.label: Slippery
pills.detail: Mossy stones under water. Dashing risks a Dex save.

zones.name: Hermit's Path
zones.description: Barely visible under fallen leaves. An old route, known only to a few.

templates.name: Building Interior
templates.description: Rooms and corridors inside a large structure — mansion, keep, or temple.
templates.scenario: [Example] The steward stole from his master and runs through the manor halls.

zones.name: Grand Hall
zones.description: High ceilings, marble floors, echoing footsteps. Tables and guests in the way.

pills.label: Crowded
pills.detail: Guests and servants everywhere. Stealth is nearly impossible.

zones.name: Stairwell
zones.description: A spiral staircase leading up and down. A choke point, and an opportunity.

zones.name: Servant Corridor
zones.description: Narrow, poorly lit, smelling of ash and laundry soap. Fewer witnesses.

zones.name: Library
zones.description: Towering shelves, ladders, a maze of reading nooks. Quiet, but tight quarters.

pills.label: Obstacle
pills.detail: Ladders, stacks, tight passages. Athletics to move through at speed.

zones.name: Kitchen
zones.description: Fires, knives, running servants. A back door opens onto the yard.

pills.label: Obstacle
pills.detail: Fire, steam, hot steel. Passing costs a Dex save or minor fire damage.

zones.name: Courtyard
zones.description: Open cobblestones under the sky. No cover, but many exits.

templates.name: Undercity
templates.description: Sewer tunnels, forgotten passages, and the things that live in the dark.
templates.scenario: [Example] An informant flees into the sewers, enforcers hunting him down.

zones.name: Grate
zones.description: Iron bars above. Daylight, air, and noise from the street.

zones.name: Main Tunnel
zones.description: Waist-deep brown water. Echoes carry far down here.

zones.name: Side Passage
zones.description: Too narrow for two abreast. The walls are wet.

zones.name: Cistern
zones.description: A round chamber, water to the knees. Old brickwork, ancient.

zones.name: Collapsed Section
zones.description: Rubble and standing water. A climb, if you're brave.

pills.label: Obstacle
pills.detail: Unstable rubble over hidden pits. Athletics to cross without slipping.

templates.name: Feywild
templates.description: Twilight woods where bargains have weight and time slips like water.
templates.scenario: [Example] A fey trickster flees through the twilight wood, the court's hounds baying behind.

zones.name: Twilight Glade
zones.description: Saturated dusk colors. Fireflies, or something pretending to be.

zones.name: Mushroom Ring
zones.description: A perfect circle of red-capped fungi. Step inside at your peril.

zones.name: Singing Brook
zones.description: The water hums in a tongue almost remembered.

zones.name: Hollow Oak
zones.description: A door inside the trunk. It does not always open the same way.

zones.name: Bramble Path
zones.description: Thorns that part for the right kind of guest. Or close on the wrong.

pills.label: Obstacle
pills.detail: Thorns that judge the passer. Athletics or Nature to cross without cuts.

templates.name: Shadowfell
templates.description: Gray lands where memory frays and color forgets itself.
templates.scenario: [Example] A fading soul flees the gray lands, gloomhands pursuing to drag them back.

zones.name: Ashen Road
zones.description: A path of gray dust. No footprints linger here.

zones.name: Withered Grove
zones.description: Trees with no leaves, no birds, no sound except wind through bone.

zones.name: Broken Bridge
zones.description: Half a span over a ravine of fog. The other half is gone, or never was.

pills.label: Obstacle
pills.detail: A leap of faith over fog. Athletics to cross without falling.

zones.name: Old Battlefield
zones.description: Rusted weapons, faded banners, the dead who don't remember dying.

zones.name: Forgotten Cairn
zones.description: Stones piled by someone, for someone. Both forgotten now.

templates.name: Underdark
templates.description: Vast caverns, narrow chasms, and things older than the surface knows.
templates.scenario: [Example] A drow informant flees deep into the Underdark, his masters' enforcers close behind.

zones.name: Vast Cavern
zones.description: A space too large to see across. The ceiling is rumor, not fact.

zones.name: Fungal Thicket
zones.description: Glowing caps as tall as a man. Spores drift like slow snow.

zones.name: Narrow Chasm
zones.description: A crack in the world. Wide enough to leap, deep enough to wonder.

pills.label: Obstacle
pills.detail: A leap over a deep crack. Athletics to clear without falling.

zones.name: Crystal Chamber
zones.description: Faceted growth on every surface. Light bends and lies here.

zones.name: Deep Pool
zones.description: Black water with no bottom anyone has confirmed. Something stirs.

zones.name: Drow Outpost
zones.description: Stone carved with cruel grace. Watchers who do not blink.

templates.name: Blank
templates.description: An empty map. Build your own chase from the ground up.
templates.scenario: [Example] Set the scene in a sentence.
